chapter_title.ar: بَابُ عَرْضِ الْأَعْمَالِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – The deeds are presented to the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and the Imams<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/ 3)
text: سَمِعْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْأَعْمَالَ تُعْرَضُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَبْرَارَهَا وَ فُجَّارَهَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Washha who said,
‘I heard Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The deeds get presented to Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, its righteous ones and its immoral ones’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ who has said the following. “I heard Imam al-Rida saying, ‘All the deeds: good and bad ones are presented before the Messenger of Allah.’”
